mapper.select: SELECT id, title, summary, content_md, content_html, category, tag, tag_type, cover_icon, cover_color, status, view_count, like_count, is_top, sort, create_time, update_time FROM blog_article WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article (title, summary, content_md, content_html, category, tag, tag_type, cover_icon, cover_color, status, view_count, like_count, is_top, sort, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{contentMd}, #{contentHtml}, #{category}, #{tag}, #{tagType}, #{coverIcon}, #{coverColor}, #{status}, 0, 0, #{isTop}, #{sort}, NOW())
